productName: Rosin Infused Joint Box - The Menage X Puro Loco - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Puro Loco supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lavender, tar, and blue cheese, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
